title: centaurea × delicata
intro: Centaurea × delicata, also known as the mountain or cornflower, is a hybrid plant of the genus Centaurea, characterized by its delicate, sky-blue flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. Centaurea × delicata is valued for its health benefits, such as its antioxidant and antibacterial properties, which may help to boost the immune system and fight off infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
